Row 62 · Category 3

}

Row 172 · Category 6

Every 30 minutes, if the temperature is 20 degrees or higher and below 30 degrees, set the air conditioner to auto mode; if it is 30 degrees or higher, set it to cool mode.

}

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
triggered := false
if ((#MotionSensor).motionsensor_motion == true) {
    if (triggered == false) {
        new = (#Light).light_currentbrightness + 10
        if (new >= 100) { (#Light).light_movetobrightness(100, 0); break; }
        else { (#Light).light_movetobrightness(new, 0); }
        triggered = true
    }
} else {
    triggered = false
}

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
prev := (#LightSensor).lightsensor_brightness

curr = (#LightSensor).lightsensor_brightness

if (prev >= 200 and curr < 200) {
 
    all(#Light).switch_on()

}

prev = curr

curr = (#LightSensor).lightsensor_brightness

all(#Light).switch_on()
}
prev = curr

GT JOICode

}

prev = curr

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
prev := (#DoorLock).doorlock_doorlockstate

curr = (#DoorLock).doorlock_doorlockstate

if (prev != "closed" and curr == "closed") {

    (#Entrance #Light).levelcontrol_movetolevel(100, 0)

    delay(10 SEC)

    (#Entrance #Light).switch_off()

}

prev = curr

(#Entrance #Light).levelcontrol_movetolevel(100, 0)

(#Entrance #Light).switch_off()
}
prev = curr

cron="" · period=100
prev := (#Entrance #PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence

curr = (#Entrance #PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence

if (prev == false and curr == true) {

    (#Entrance #Light).levelcontrol_movetolevel(100, 0)

    delay(3 SEC)

    (#Entrance #Light).switch_off()

}

prev = curr

  • Switch_Onraw On · arg - · ret VOID · Allows for the control of a Switch device

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=3600000
active := 0

if (active == 0) {

    wait until ((#ServerRack #HumiditySensor).humiditysensor_humidity > 70)

    (#Lab #Dehumidifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode("dehumidifying")

    active = 1

}

if ((#ServerRack #HumiditySensor).humiditysensor_humidity < 50) {

    (#Lab #Dehumidifier).switch_off()

}

active = 1
}
if ((#ServerRack #HumiditySensor).humiditysensor_humidity < 50) {
(#Lab #Dehumidifier).switch_off()
}

GT JOICode

cron="" · period=100
prev := (#MeetingRoom #Door).door_doorstate
 
curr = (#MeetingRoom #Door).door_doorstate

if (prev != "open" and curr == "open") {

    (#Light).levelcontrol_movetolevel(100, 0)

    delay(10 SEC)

    (#Light).switch_off()

}

prev = curr
